Go to the documentation of this file.

00005 #pragma once
00006 #include "sprite/builtins.hpp"
00007 #include "sprite/common.hpp"
00008 #include "sprite/fingerprint.hpp"
00009 #include "sprite/node.hpp"
00010 #include "sprite/program.hpp"
00011 #include "sprite/rewrite.hpp"
00012 
00013 namespace sprite
00014 {
00015   struct Program;
00016 
00018   extern Program const * g_program;
00019 
00021   enum TraceOption { NO_TRACE=false, TRACE=true };
00022 
00030   struct YieldHandler
00031   {
00032     virtual void yield(Node const & result) const = 0;
00033     virtual ~YieldHandler() {}
00034   };
00035 
00041   template<typename OutputIterator>
00042   struct YieldHandler_ : YieldHandler
00043   {
00044     explicit YieldHandler_(OutputIterator out) : m_out(out) {}
00045   private:
00046     OutputIterator m_out;
00047   public:
00048     virtual void yield(Node const & result) const
00049       { *m_out++ = result; }
00050     virtual ~YieldHandler_() {}
00051   };
00052 
00054   template<> struct YieldHandler_<void> : YieldHandler
00055   {
00056     virtual void yield(Node const &) const {}
00057     virtual ~YieldHandler_() {}
00058   };
00059 
00079   void execute(
00080       Program const & program, Node & goal
00081     , YieldHandler const & handler = YieldHandler_<void>()
00082     , TraceOption trace=NO_TRACE
00083     );
00084 
00085   inline void execute(
00086       Program const & program, Node & goal, TraceOption trace
00087     )
00088   { execute(program, goal, YieldHandler_<void>(), trace); }
00089   
00091   template<typename OutputIterator>
00092   inline void execute(
00093       Program const & pgm, Node & goal, OutputIterator out
00094     , TraceOption trace=NO_TRACE
00095     )
00096   {
00097     YieldHandler_<OutputIterator> handler(out);
00098     execute(pgm, goal, static_cast<YieldHandler const &>(handler), trace);
00099   }
00100 
00102   inline bool is_norm(Node const & node)
00103   {
00104     if(!is_ctor(node.tag())) return false;
00105 
00106     BOOST_FOREACH(NodePtr const & child, node.iter())
00107       { if(!is_norm(*child)) return false; }
00108 
00109     return true;
00110   }
00111 
00120   inline void pull_tab(Node & g, NodePtr const & p)
00121   {
00122     size_t const i = g.position(p);
00123     assert(p->tag() == CHOICE);
00124     NodePtr lhs = g.clone();
00125     lhs[i] = p[0];
00126     NodePtr rhs = g.clone();
00127     rhs[i] = p[1];
00128     rewrite_choice(g, p->id(), lhs, rhs);
00129   }
00130 
00139   inline void head_normalize(Node & node)
00140   {
00141     switch(node.tag())
00142     {
00143       // For operations, call the H function.
00144       case OPER:
00145         return g_program->oper[node.id()](node);
00146 
00147       // For non-constructors, throw.
00148       case FAIL: case CHOICE: case FWD:
00149         throw RuntimeError(
00150             "defined operation or constructor expected in "
00151               + std::string(BOOST_CURRENT_FUNCTION)
00152           );
00153 
00154       // Ignore constructor types.
00155       case INT: case FLOAT: case CTOR: default:
00156         return; // H.6
00157     }
00158   }
00159 
00161   inline void fair_normalize(Fingerprint const & fp, Node & node)
00162   {
00163     switch(node.tag())
00164     {
00165       case OPER:
00166         return head_normalize(node);
00167 
00168       case INT: // Always a cnf.
00169       case FLOAT: // Always a cnf.
00170         return;
00171 
00172       default:
00173       {
00174         // TODO: must rewrite this section to match the paper.
00175         // In particular, the choice and fail rules must be applied
00176         // BEFORE any recursive calls to fair_normalize.
00177         BOOST_FOREACH(NodePtr & child, node.iter())
00178         {
00179           switch(child->tag())
00180           {
00181             case FAIL: return rewrite_fail(node);
00182             case CTOR: fair_normalize(fp, *child); break;
00183             case OPER: head_normalize(*child); break;
00184             case CHOICE: return pull_tab(node, child);
00185             case INT: case FLOAT: break;
00186             case FWD: throw RuntimeError("Unexpected FWD node.");
00187           }
00188         }
00189       }
00190     }
00191   }
00192 
00198   void print_node(Node const &);
00199 }
